prestazioni: 2AZ-FE 2.4L I4 engine (stock code) forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Full-Race Motorsports, supporting 12 psi of boost with a 44mm external wastegate (Tial MV-R) and 3-inch downpipe paired to a custom 3-inch straight-pipe exhaust system with Burns Stainless mufflers for optimal spool and flow

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom 2AZ-FE speed-density tuning map, including dual Bosch 0280158002 4.9L/min fuel injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and AEM 320LPH inline fuel pump for E85 compatibility, paired with a custom 3-core aluminum radiator (Koyorad) and dual 10-inch SPAL fans for thermal management

Full bolt-on suspension overhaul featuring KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear), Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear), Whiteline adjustable rear camber arms, and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) for the rear trailing arms, paired with StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 328mm rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, including extended fenders (1.5-inch wider front, 2-inch wider rear) and custom aluminum overfenders for aggressive stance, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with functional dual NACA ducts for intercooler and radiator cooling, paired with a custom rear wing (Voltex Type-5) mounted on a custom aluminum wing riser (3-inch height) for adjustable angle and downforce, finished in 3M Matte Glacier White with custom vinyl overlays (black and red accents) by VViViD Vinyls

Interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back) with custom red Alcantara upholstery and Takata 4-point harnesses, paired with a custom bolt-in roll cage (6-point, mild steel) by Custom Cages, Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) with NRG quick-release hub, and a custom center console housing an AiM MXS Strada dash logger with integrated boost and wideband AFR gauges
